description: Create a geographic proximity network in the 'demodb' database. Define a new edge class 'NearBy' (extending E) with properties 'Distance' (DOUBLE) and 'City' (STRING). For all pairs of Hotels and Restaurants located in the same city, create a 'NearBy' edge from the Hotel to the Restaurant. Calculate the distance between them in kilometers using the Haversine formula (R=6371 km) and store the result in the 'Distance' property and the city name in the 'City' property. Export a report to /home/ga/proximity_report.txt with each edge formatted as '{City} | {Hotel} -> {Restaurant} | {Distance} km' and a final line 'Total pairs: {N}'.
